mapper.insert: insert into reward_account(user_id, available_balance, frozen_balance, version, update_time) values(#{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, 0, 0, 0, current_timestamp)
mapper.update: update reward_account set available_balance = available_balance + #{delta}, version = version + 1, update_time = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY} and available_balance + #{delta} >= 0

update reward_account set available_balance = available_balance - #{amount}, frozen_balance = frozen_balance + #{amount}, version = version + 1, update_time = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY} and available_balance >= #{amount}

update reward_account set available_balance = available_balance + #{amount}, frozen_balance = frozen_balance - #{amount}, version = version + 1, update_time = current_timestamp where user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY} and frozen_balance >= #{amount}
